items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic notifications to qualified substitutes.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic notification system for qualified substitutes upon cancellation. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this notification system. The linked use case mentions the need for such notifications but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is being met in the current saga run.
